title: AvailableCalendarByOffice

startDate.description: Start date of the requested day-status range in YYYY-MM-DD format

endDate.description: End date of the requested day-status range in YYYY-MM-DD format

slotsStartDate.description: Start date of the appointment slots window in YYYY-MM-DD format

slotsEndDate.description: End date of the appointment slots window in YYYY-MM-DD format

prevBookableDate.description: Nearest bookable day before the slots window (may skip empty months)

nextBookableDate.description: Nearest bookable day after the slots window (may skip empty months)

availableDays.description: Bookable days with appointment slots grouped by office

description: Schema defining available days and appointment slots for offices and services
